main.description: A biodiversity data entry. The minimal, signed, taxonomically-anchored link that forms the Sporechain network. Entries are the chain. Content lives above.

subject.description: Scientific name (binomial nomenclature). The taxonomic anchor.

tags.description: Classification tags (entry type, kingdom, provenance, etc.)

cid.description: IPFS CID pointing to content payload (images, docs, data, custom pages).

parents.description: AT-URI references to parent entries. DAG linkage for lineage, provenance, context.
